title: juncus biglumis
intro: Juncus biglumis, also known as Bigelow's rush or jointed rush, is a perennial plant species within the Juncaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Juncus biglumis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Juncus biglumis include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
